evals.prompt: 我要怎么下载安装 shell-manage？我是 Apple Silicon Mac，现在可以访问 GitHub。
expected_behaviors: Uses GitHub Releases as the only public release source
Accepts only the latest release when draft and prerelease are both false
Uses only a matching returned asset browser_download_url and never guesses a checksum

evals.prompt: 我现在无法访问 GitHub，告诉我 shell-manage 最新版、下载地址和 SHA。
expected_behaviors: Returns only https://github.com/liuzhuang/shell-manage/releases
Does not infer a version from package.json, build configuration, examples, or cached data
Does not guess a version, asset URL, checksum, architecture, or filename

evals.prompt: 帮我确认 shell-manage 有没有新版本并说明怎么升级。
expected_behaviors: Reads the current version from the running application
Reads the target version and assets only from the latest stable GitHub Release
Does not use the source package version as public release truth

evals.prompt: 升级 shell-manage 后软件打不开了，但我没有旧安装包，怎么回滚？
expected_behaviors: Backs up config and fully exits the application before rollback
Provides the GitHub Releases page for selecting an official historical release
Does not invent a historical version, asset URL, or checksum

evals.prompt: 帮我把这个 Next.js 项目接入 shell-manage，项目路径是 /Users/dev/my-app。
expected_behaviors: Reads package.json scripts before proposing commands
Proposes cd /Users/dev/my-app && npm run dev style one-liners
Shows the minimal diff and does not call the write tool before explicit confirmation
After confirmation changes only the target command and preserves other commands, presets, settings, and sentinel fields
Rereads and validates the config after writing

evals.prompt: 给 shell-manage 新增一个叫 dev 的命令，但配置里已经有 dev 了。
expected_behaviors: Detects the same-name conflict
Does not write after a generic confirmation that withholds overwrite authorization
Writes only after a separate explicit confirmation naming the dev overwrite
Rereads and validates the config while preserving unrelated fields

evals.prompt: 我的 YAML 配置缺少 settings，但我还想新增命令。
expected_behaviors: Detects the missing top-level settings mapping
Blocks the command write until structure is repaired
Leaves the config file hash unchanged and reports write_status: not_written

evals.prompt: 新增 ssh root@1.2.3.4，并绑定已经配置的生产密钥。
expected_behaviors: Uses mode: terminal for interactive SSH
References the key with sshKeyId instead of embedding an -i path
Requires explicit confirmation before writing
Preserves unrelated config and rereads the file after writing

evals.prompt: shell-manage 怎么用标签筛选命令？
expected_behaviors: Answers the usage question without modifying config
Includes write_status: not_written
Includes next step, success criteria, and rollback note

evals.prompt: 我已经有 shell-manage 仓库源码，只想在本机生成并检查 DMG。
expected_behaviors: Uses the repository installer build and verification scripts
States that the local artifact is not a public release
Does not derive a public version or download URL from the local artifact
